page_content:
Program Learning Outcomes

1. Students will be able to explain the history of terrorism, characteristics of terrorist organizations, and the impact of terrorism on individuals, groups, and societies

2. Students will be able to explain the theories and frameworks explaining terrorist motivations and behaviors

3. Students will be able to explain how topics related to diversity and culture affect extremism and counterterrorism

4. Students will be able to develop innovative approaches to help counter terrorism

5. Students will be able to apply skills and knowledge gained through experiential learning to a career in security studies
